title: rubus zhaogoshanensis
intro: Rubus zhaogoshanensis, a species of wild raspberry native to China's Guangdong and Guangxi provinces, is a member of the Rosaceae family and is also known as the Zhaogoshan bramble. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Rubus zhaogoshanensis include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit potential anti-cancer properties. Rubus zhaogoshanensis is often prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or dried fruit, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
